offer: For property managers handling 10-50 rental units/month, manual report preparation causes late compliance submissions. We automate report generation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating timely and accurate compliance reports for rental properties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant community
